Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: First I need to start by grounding the answer in the DECLARE constraints walk through the actual step by step process first then map each step to the constraints that enforce it talk about real world motivations then what happens if rules are broken

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The init constraint says Receive Application is the start Existence Receive Application and Gather Additional Documents must happen at least once in every valid process instance Exactly one Preliminary Credit Check happens exactly once per process no more no less Absence Proceed Without Compliance never happens that is forbidden Response After Receive Application Preliminary Credit Check must happen eventually

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Succession is combination of response and precedence So Preliminary Credit Check succession to Gather Additional Documents means after credit check you have to gather docs and you cannot gather docs before credit check

Name: Validation - PE
Text: That matches the example the user gave ensuring a quality assurance review before final authorization Perfect that checks out

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait also responded existence Assemble Loan Offer Package has target Quality Assurance Review So responded existence A B means if A occurs B must have occurred before A Wait no wait responded existence is for every occurrence of A there is at least one occurrence of B that occurred before A

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So you cannot put together the loan offer package unless QA has already reviewed something

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Chainresponse is immediate and chain succession Quality Assurance Review target Assemble Loan Offer Package means QA Review is immediately followed by Assemble Loan Offer

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: I messed up the direction for precedence constraints Let us get the DECLARE constraint definitions straight once and for all because direction matters a lot

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Precedence A B means for every occurrence of B there is at least one occurrence of A that occurs before B So B can only happen if A happened before

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The user example says ensuring a quality assurance review before final authorization so QA Review before Authorize Contract Terms which matches exactly

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait wait maybe I got chainprecedence backwards That cannot be because between credit check and authorize we have Gather Additional Documents QA and Assemble

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Maybe in this model the alt constraints are just enforcing that Transfer Funds and Notify Customer are ordered but not immediate

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Init Receive Application first Response Receive Application to Preliminary Credit Check means after receiving the application you must do a preliminary credit check Exactly one means only one credit check Succession Preliminary Credit Check to Gather Additional Documents means after credit check you must gather additional documents and you cannot gather documents before credit check

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Coexistence Gather Additional Documents and Authorize Contract Terms means if you gather docs you have to authorize contract terms and vice versa

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Precedence Quality Assurance Review and Authorize Contract Terms means Authorize Contract Terms can only happen if Quality Assurance Review happened before

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Responded Existence Assemble Loan Offer Package and Quality Assurance Review means if you Assemble Loan Offer then QA Review must have happened before Assemble cannot happen before QA

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Chain Succession Quality Assurance Review and Assemble Loan Offer Package means QA Review is immediately followed by Assemble Loan Offer Package

Name: Pattern Recognition - IND
Text: Nonchainsuccession Authorize Contract Terms and Notify Customer means Authorize Contract Terms cannot be immediately followed by Notify Customer
